programme.title: Marshals

programme.title: CIA
programme.desc: When a wanted Belarusian national is discovered posing as an expecting father, Colin and Bill work to expose an international illegal baby smuggling ring; Bill worries about his father's health back home.

programme.desc: Nearly 41 years after a New York teen's murder, a surprising breakthrough brings new answers.

programme.title: She's in the Game
programme.desc: Meet the next generation of superstar female athletes around the country as we go behind the scenes to shine the light on them and their interests off the field, along with catching up with the female legends who paved the way for all this growth.

programme.title: CBS LA Mornings at 5am
programme.desc: Start your day with CBS LA Mornings, covering breaking stories from The Desk, and NEXT Weather and Traffic for Southern California.

programme.title: CBS News Sunday Morning
programme.desc: Cuba; singer Kacey Musgraves; artist Jenny Saville; the tale behind the series "Welcome to Wrexham"; a new free online tool that can help keep one's brain healthy; a group trying to save the Venus flytrap; Rep. Jim Clyburn (D-S.C.); a young girl who sees what's possible; people passionate about trees.

programme.title: Face the Nation
programme.desc: Sen. Tim Kaine (D-Va.); Dr. Mehmet Oz, administrator for the Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services; Mike Wirth, Chevron CEO; Sir Christian Turner, British ambassador to the U.S.; former Food and Drug Administration commissioner Dr. Scott Gottlieb.

programme.title: CBS LA at 8:30am
programme.desc: Stay informed with the latest breaking news and headlines.

programme.title: Emma: Natural Relief for Bloating, Constipation & Gut Imbalance
programme.desc: Tired of bloating or gut issues that won't go away?; discovering the root cause-and how Emma can help eliminate methane-producing archaea, reset digestion and restore balance naturally.

programme.title: 2026 Proof Silver Eagle: America's 250th Anniversary Release
programme.desc: Join Mike Mezack for a historic release, the first-ever 1776-2026 dual-date Proof Silver Eagle with Liberty Bell privy mark, struck in .999 silver for America's 250th Anniversary; a one-year-only issue collectors won't want to miss.

programme.title: PBR Bull Riding
programme.desc: Highlights from April 24 & 25, 2026 in Tacoma, Wash.

programme.title: The Road to Bandon
programme.desc: Narrated by Johnson Wagner, featuring six PGA of America Golf Professionals from across the country as they prepare to compete in the 2026 PGA Professional Championship at Bandon Dunes Golf Resort.

programme.title: All-Access Club Car Championship at the Landings Golf & Athletic Club
programme.desc: A behind-the-scenes look at a week on the Korn Ferry Tour in Savannah, Ga. Follow Barend Botha of South Africa, Carson Bacha of the U.S., and Justin Hastings of the Cayman Islands as they navigate the challenges of trying to reach the PGA TOUR.

programme.title: Live: PGA Tour Golf
programme.desc: The New Orleans doubles tournament concludes with final-round action at TPC Louisiana. Teams compete in foursomes for the championship trophy and 400 FedExCup points. The field aims to navigate the hazards of this 7,425-yard Pete Dye-designed course.

programme.title: 60 Minutes
programme.sub-title: Ben Sasse; Disaster Tourists; The Pigeon Mafia
programme.desc: Former Sen. Ben Sasse (R-Fla.); the increasing trend of disaster tourists; elite racing pigeons becoming targets for organized crime.

programme.title: Marshals
programme.desc: With one of their own taken prisoner, the Marshals strategize a risky assault on a paramilitary compound; outmanned, outgunned and with time rapidly running out, Kayce leads the team straight into the fire, risking everything to save their teammate.

programme.title: Tracker
programme.desc: While searching for answers about his father, Colter is pulled into a tense case involving a teenage boy's missing parents, uncovering a dangerous situation far more complicated than it first appears.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Tomas seeks out Vanessa for intel on Lynette; Hayley's inaction where Bill is concerned rubs Naomi the wrong way; Ashley breaks the rules for the greater good; Jacob worries Grayson won't deliver; Lia makes another threat.

programme.sub-title: Shocking Family Beatdown! Life Insurance Loser?

programme.sub-title: Phantom Boyfriend in Malaysia?; Car Fiasco!

programme.title: DMV
programme.desc: Colette agrees to oversee Ceci's grandmother's driving test to win her approval, only to discover Ceci's request to fail her is far more personal; Barb spirals when Vic's dog takes a liking to her DMV rival.
